level_1.label: Exact neighborhood
level_1.description: Property is in the exact requested neighborhood

level_2.label: Accepted alternative
level_2.description: Property is in an explicitly accepted alternative neighborhood

level_3.label: Neighboring district
level_3.description: Property is in a neighboring district within same city

level_4.label: Same city distant
level_4.description: Property is in same city but far from requested zone

level_5.label: Incompatible zone
level_5.description: Property is in an incompatible zone

proximity_rules.priority_order: Ville exacte -> Quartier exact -> Quartiers compatibles autorisés -> WAITLISTED
proximity_rules.forbidden: Ville exacte -> Ville voisine (never propose a different city)

handling_uncovered_city.message: Nous n'avons pas encore d'offres actives à [VILLE]. Je garde votre recherche en veille et je vous préviens dès qu'un bien correspondant arrive.
